name: Lightning Bolts
description: Recursive midpoint-displacement lightning bolts with branching, glow passes, and fade-out. Spawns on interval or click.
accessibility_notes: sudden bright flashes may affect photosensitive users

interval.description: Auto-spawn interval in milliseconds (0 to disable)

branchChance.description: Probability of each bolt segment branching

color.description: RGB color array for bolt segments

glowIntensity.description: Glow radius multiplier around bolt segments

className.description: CSS class for the canvas element

conflicts: frequent spawns with high branchChance create many draw calls
flash effect is inherently problematic for photosensitivity
